Simulated clone portfolio rebalanced quarterly at 13F weights, normalised to 1 at inception. Clone all uses every reported position. Clone top N keeps only the largest N positions, equal-weighted. +45d public simulates an investor who acts only after the filing becomes public (45 days after quarter-end). Compared against SPY as benchmark.

Trade Performance: price return in the 180 days after quarter-end, normalised to 0% at quarter-end; dashed line = +45d (13F public date); pink dashes = Put options. Δ% weight can be misleading when options are present: adding large Put positions inflates AUM and compresses all stock weights. Δ$ = Δ shares × implied price — captures partial profit-taking even when position value stays flat due to price appreciation.

Clone top N keeps only the largest N positions, equal-weighted. +45d public simulates an investor who acts only after the filing becomes public (45 days after quarter-end). Compared against SPY as benchmark.

Trade Performance: price return in the 180 days after quarter-end, normalised to 0% at quarter-end; dashed line = +45d (13F public date); pink dashes = Put options. Δ% weight can be misleading when options are present: adding large Put positions inflates AUM and compresses all stock weights. Δ$ = Δ shares × implied price — captures partial profit-taking even when position value stays flat due to price appreciation.

Trade Performance: price return in the 180 days after quarter-end, normalised to 0% at quarter-end; dashed line = +45d (13F public date); pink dashes = Put options. Δ% weight can be misleading when options are present: adding large Put positions inflates AUM and compresses all stock weights. Δ$ = Δ shares × implied price — captures partial profit-taking even when position value stays flat due to price appreciation.

Δ% weight can be misleading when options are present: adding large Put positions inflates AUM and compresses all stock weights. Δ$ = Δ shares × implied price — captures partial profit-taking even when position value stays flat due to price appreciation.

Simulated clone portfolio rebalanced quarterly at 13F weights, normalised to 1 at inception. Clone all uses every reported position. Clone top N keeps only the largest N positions, equal-weighted. +45d public simulates an investor who acts only after the filing becomes public (45 days after quarter-end). Compared against SPY as benchmark.
